docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY STEWART VERN AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS SPENCER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS SPENCER
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY THOMAS SPENCER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT STEWART VERN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEWART VERN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THOMAS SPENCER PLTF UNABLE TO SHOW 1ST PREPONDERANCE OF EVID THAT DOOR AND LOCKS PROXIMATE CAUSE FOR BURGALARY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
